description_long: This is a DeWalt cordless electric drill, featuring a robust yellow and black plastic housing with ergonomic contours for comfortable handling. The front section includes a metallic chuck for securing drill bits, with a visible adjustment ring for torque settings. The side of the drill displays prominent DeWalt branding and model information, while the rear is labeled 'BRUSHLESS MOTOR' in bold yellow text. The base of the drill houses a detachable battery pack, marked '20V MAX XR', which provides cordless power. A metallic belt clip is attached to the side for convenient carrying, and the handle is textured for a secure grip. The drill is compact and portable, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban construction sites.
description: A compact, yellow and black DeWalt cordless electric drill with a metallic chuck, ergonomic handle, and detachable battery pack. Features clear branding, a belt clip, and a textured grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic chuck, adjustment ring, and the symmetrical handle and battery pack.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the DeWalt branding, torque adjustment ring, and the belt clip on the battery pack.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'BRUSHLESS MOTOR' label and the full length of the handle and battery pack.
description_view_3: Right side view showing technical information, battery pack details, and the opposite side of the belt clip.
